query: Just wrapped up the QA sync for v1.1 — there are like 8 bugs we need to file. Can you pull the notes and walk me through filing them?
Hey can you go through the latest product sync notes and triage what came up? The notes should be on Drive or in my Downloads folder, called something with 'Product Sync' in it
I want to update the QA sheet with the bugs we just discussed on the call
process the bugs from yesterday's qa review
after our product sync I have a bunch of bugs to file in linear and add to the QA tracker — got 30 min before next call
Let's triage all the bugs from the QA session and figure out who fixes what. PostHog should have data on most of them
Can you extract the bugs from the meeting notes and file linear issues? I think we mentioned a few PWA iOS upload issues and some admin stuff

OK so on the QA call this morning Gui flagged that the offline queue is double-flushing on Android, and the admin assess flow doesn't gate invalid input properly. Need to turn these into trackable items.
the meeting notes from the product sync are in ~/Downloads as a Notes by Gemini file. Process them and file the bugs
I need to take the bugs from our QA pass and put them in the green goods v1.1 qa workbook. PRD records too.
We have a production incident — users on iOS can't submit work right now. Need to triage immediately, posthog is showing a spike on $exception with Failed to fetch
Can you review my PR? It's the offline queue refactor on the develop branch, packages/shared changes
I'm doing test strategy for the new garden settings page. What unit tests do we need vs e2e?
Here's a docx of the NLnet grant proposal — the team left a bunch of comments and tracked changes. Can you process them?
Just got off a call with the Hypercert team. They had thoughts on how to integrate Green Goods with Hypercerts. Can you summarize the action items into a doc?
Plan out the work for moving the auth middleware to passkey-only. Multi-package, contracts + shared + admin.
Write a runbook for restoring the indexer after a docker crash. We had to do it manually twice this week
Run an accessibility audit on the new /garden/overview page. Focus on color contrast and keyboard nav
the bug-intake routine isn't picking up bugs from the #bug-report Discord channel anymore, can you check what's broken with the cron run from this morning?
Help me set up a new cron schedule for the health-watch routine to run at 8am daily instead of 7:30
